name: pc-webcam-rtsp
description: Publish a directly connected PC webcam as an RTSP stream for an NVR.

scripts.speech-clean: NOISE_REDUCTION=24 NOISE_FLOOR=-48 GATE_THRESHOLD=0.035 MIC_GAIN=0.38 node server.js
scripts.natural-voice: NOISE_REDUCTION=12 NOISE_FLOOR=-38 GATE_THRESHOLD=0.018 MIC_GAIN=0.55 node server.js
